_record: runs/<space>/funnels/<funnel_id>.json — belief-instance record (6b, N per funnel)
_produced_by: s2-section-analyzer (agent, PROVISIONAL — one record per belief installed/reinforced)
_note: position is funnel-level ordinal, NOT page-local (D-12). verbatim_refs[].text must be a verbatim substring of the cleaned funnel copy (validator-enforced — kills hallucinated quotes). source_routing is a contract-gated ghost field (see enums.json) — not yet emitted.

shape.position: int — funnel-level ordinal across the whole funnel; NOT page-local
shape.belief_id: enum:BELIEF_ID_ANCHORS (open-with-anchors — a new id allowed but then belief_confidence MUST be 'low')
shape.execution_type: enum:EXECUTION_TYPE — HOW the belief is installed
shape.execution_detail: string — GRANULAR free text; the sub-claim must be recoverable
moves: enum:MOVE — discrete persuasive moves in this section

verbatim_refs.text: string — exact verbatim substring from cleaned funnel copy
